message:
Normalize sync round-trip: labels, external_ref, comment remapping, and auto-derive prefix

Sync normalization:
- Sort and dedup labels during export for consistent round-trip hashing
- Normalize external_ref (empty string → None) to prevent UNIQUE constraint
  violations during re-import
- Fix comment issue_id remapping during import when IDs are renamed

Close command:
- Only report "unblocked" issues that are still active (skip closed ones)

Init command:
- Auto-derive the issue prefix from the directory name when --prefix is
  not provided, instead of leaving it unset
- Write the derived prefix into the generated config.yaml comment

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
